info.title: Health Check API
info.description: Memory health endpoint for the Next.js 15+ performance showcase. Designed to be called by Kubernetes liveness probes and fluid-compute idle cycles.

get.description: Returns RSS and heap metrics. Triggers manual GC (stop-the-world) when RSS > 1.5 GB if the server was started with --expose-gc. Returns HTTP 503 when RSS > 1.8 GB so Kubernetes can restart the pod before an OOM kill.

503.description: Memory pressure — RSS exceeded the 1.8 GB threshold

status.description: ok when RSS is below 1.8 GB; memory_pressure otherwise

rssGb.description: Resident Set Size in gigabytes, formatted to 2 decimal places

heapUsedMb.description: V8 heap used in megabytes, formatted to 1 decimal place

heapTotalMb.description: V8 heap total in megabytes, formatted to 1 decimal place

externalMb.description: External (C++ objects bound to JS) memory in megabytes

gcTriggered.description: Whether manual global.gc() was invoked during this request
